prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次依次为6305→3359→6828→7569→2517，波动剧烈。2025年位次大幅前移至2517名，创近五年最佳，主要受新高考专业组选科（ 物理+化学）门槛影响，部分低分专业组拉低整体位次。近两年（2024→2025）位次前移约5052名，波动幅度极大；该校在内蒙古理科（物理类）招生计划2021年 99人、2022年102人、2023年101人、2024年99人、2025年101人、2026年100人，2026年较2025年小幅缩招1人，计划基本持平，对竞争格局影响有限。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北 京交通大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第41名，近年排名稳定在40–43名区间，属于全国顶尖211行列；2026年高考周期声誉评价 为偏负面，主要涉及实验室爆炸火灾事故的历史舆情，但该事件距今较久，对当前报考心理影响有限；抖音热度排名第45位（较热），短视频曝光量中等，未见明显报考关注异常 升温或降温信号；历史投档异常记录中未出现该校断档信号；系统科学A+（全国第一）、交通运输工程A、信息与通信工程A、计算机科学与技术A-、土木工程A- 、管理科学与工程A-，共6个A-及以上学科。其中计算机、交通运输、电子信息等强势学科与当前社会高热专业方向高度匹配，对理科考生吸引力较强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类（高热推荐）、电子信息/通信（高热推荐）、电气工程及其自动化（高热推荐）等专业社会热度持续走高，与北交大优势学科高度契合，有望推高报考热度。内蒙古202 6年普通高考总人数约154000人，较2025年（历史类32644+物理类83716=116360人）大幅增长约32%，物理类考生估算约110800人，竞争显著加剧。；北京交通大学位于北京市，对内蒙古考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生占比约1.5%–2%（2025年理科101人/全国总招生约5000+人），属中等偏低 水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次基准2517名、2026年小幅缩招（101→100）的微弱利好、内蒙古物理类考生大幅增长（约+32%）带来的竞争加剧、以及该校优势学科与热 门专业高度匹配的吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移（更难进）。预测最低位次约2552名，区间2092–3012名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were 6305 → 3359 → 6828 → 7569 → 2517, showing drastic fluctuations. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced to 2517, the best in five years, mainly due to the subject selection threshold (Physics + Chemistry) in the new college entrance examination, with some low-scoring subject groups lowering the overall ranking. In the past two years (2024→2025), the ranking advanced by about 5052 places, with extreme volatility; the enrollment plan for this university in Inner Mongolia for science (physics category) was 99 in 2021, 102 in 2022, 101 in 2023, 99 in 2024, 101 in 2025, and 100 in 2026, with a slight reduction of 1 person in 2026 compared to 2025, basically stable, having limited impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking is about 41st in 2026, with stable rankings in the 40–43 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier 211 universities; the reputation evaluation for the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is slightly negative, mainly involving historical public opinion about laboratory explosion and fire accidents, but the incident is relatively old and has limited impact on current application psychology; Douyin popularity ranks 45th (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure, no obvious abnormal warming or cooling signals in application attention; no signs of a cutoff in historical admission anomaly records; System Science A+ (first in the country), Transportation Engineering A, Information and Communication Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A-, Civil Engineering A-, Management Science and Engineering A-, totaling 6 A- and above disciplines. Among them, strong disciplines such as Computer Science, Transportation, and Electronic Information are highly aligned with current socially popular majors, strongly attracting science candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science (highly recommended), Electronic Information/Communication (highly recommended), and Electrical Engineering and Automation (highly recommended) continue to see rising social popularity, highly matching BJTU's advantageous disciplines, likely to boost application enthusiasm. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Inner Mongolia general college entrance examination is about 154,000, a significant increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (history category 32,644 + physics category 83,716 = 116,360 people), with an estimated 110,800 physics category candidates, intensifying competition. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to Inner Mongolia candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.5%–2% (101 science students in 2025 / total national enrollment of about 5,000+), which is moderately low.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 ranking baseline of 2517, the slight reduction in enrollment in 2026 (101→100) as a weak positive, the intensified competition due to a significant increase in physics category candidates in Inner Mongolia (about +32%), and the strong appeal of the university's advantageous disciplines matching popular majors, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly decline (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2552, with a range of 2092–3012.

- Science Experimental Class (Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class Intelligence Category).

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 2092–3012, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Category, Computer Science Category) as the main direction, with Tier 1 Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class as a sprint, and Tier 3 Transportation Category and Automation Category as safe backups. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<2092), you can focus on sprinting for the Zhan Tianyou Pilot Class.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were 1041 → 968 → 1193 → 1867 → 794, showing significant overall fluctuation. In 2025, the ranking moved forward to 794, the best in the past five years, mainly due to the subdivision of new college entrance examination major groups. Over the past three years (2023→2025), the ranking moved forward from 1193 to 794, a forward shift of about 399 places. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Inner Mongolia was 9 in 2021, 9 in 2022, 9 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 13 in 2025, and 14 in 2026, showing a continuous expansion trend. In 2026, there will be one more student compared to 2025, an increase of about 7.7%, which is favorable for candidates.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Jiaotong University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. It ranks about 41st in the Soft Science ranking. Although it is strong in science and engineering, as a 211 university, it still has strong appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2026, its reputation is slightly negative (historical public opinion on laboratory explosions), but this mainly involves laboratory safety in science and engineering, with limited psychological impact on liberal arts applications. Its popularity on Douyin is relatively hot (ranked 45th), with average attention. The university's liberal arts-related discipline evaluations: Management Science and Engineering A- supports the Economics and Management Pilot Class, while Law and Journalism and Communication have not been independently rated, and liberal arts advantages are not prominent.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law (differentiated, wait-and-see) and Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged) is clearly polarized. Law still has some appeal but is highly competitive, while Journalism and Communication continues to cool down. In 2026, the estimated number of history category candidates in Inner Mongolia is about 43,200, an increase of about 32% from 32,644 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Beijing Jiaotong University is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for liberal arts candidates in Inner Mongolia. The university's enrollment proportion for liberal arts in Inner Mongolia is very small (13 in 2025 out of a total national enrollment of about 5,000+), making it a low-proportion province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 ranking benchmark of 794, the favorable factor of enrollment expansion in 2026 (13→14 students), the intensified competition due to a significant increase in history category candidates in Inner Mongolia (about +32%), and the polarization of liberal arts major popularity (Law differentiated, Journalism and Communication discouraged), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly shift backward (harder to enter) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 861, with a range of 706–1016.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 706–1016, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Network and New Media as the main target, use Tier 1 Law and Liberal Arts Pilot Class as a sprint, and Tier 3 Marxist Theory as a safety option. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<706), you can focus on sprinting for the Law major.
